form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 7 at this track Hcp on March 24 over 1100m, slow going 2 len behind Pride Of Venus carrying 54.5kg at $5.50. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.2 len at this track Bm65 January 29 over 1300m in soft going defeating Craiglea La Vie with 58kg at $1.30. Rates highly here and expected to measure right up.
